title: solanum rigescens var. rubetorum
intro: Solanum rigescens var. rubetorum, also known as the red-stemmed nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum rigescens plant, a member of the nightshade family. It is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, known for its red or purple stems and small white or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Solanum rigescens var. rubetorum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
